results.title: Govinda Responds to Viral Videos Involving Wife Sunita Ahuja
results.description: Actor Govinda has responded to the recent viral videos of his wife, Sunita Ahuja, where she appears to use inappropriate language towards him. In a candid conversation, he expressed surprise at the clips but emphasized that he holds no anger, viewing such incidents as part of their personal life. Govinda reassured friends who reached out to him, stating there was no cause for concern. His comments have sparked varied reactions on social media, with some praising his composure while others share their opinions on the situation. As of now, no further official statements have been made by the couple.

results.title: Lock Upp 2: Riteish Deshmukh Loses His Cool At Yogesh Rawat, Says, 'Don't Put This Act With Me'
results.description: A new Lock Upp 2 promo shows Riteish Deshmukh losing his cool at Yogesh Rawat during a task, telling him, "Don't put this act with me," during a heated argument.

results.title: President Trump Heaps Praise on Lindsey Graham After Senator's Untimely Death
results.description: President Trump is paying tribute to Lindsey Graham after the South Carolina senator's unexpected death, calling him a "true American patriot." In a Truth Social post, the commander-in-chief heaped praise on Graham — one of his closest...

results.title: Willie Clancy week: ‘Every shack, shed and síbín has a concertina player in it’
results.description: Whatever road you take to Miltown Malbay in early July, there’s music wafting through the air to greet you
